svg.title: AionSystem Certified Auditor Sleeve — Sovereign Trace Protocol
svg.desc: Auditor credential sleeve issued by AionSystem. Carries STP auditor badge, identity block, sovereign tier, validity window, and verification ledger entry.
svg.text: Digital signature appended to STP ledger entry
